if portfolio is None:
        # multi_factor_array的形状是[时间步, 224]，我们需要提取股票相关的特征
        # 假设前5个特征对应5个股票
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            # 使用前5个特征作为股票代理
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)
    
    # 基础等权策略
    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)
    
    # 如果market_state有效，使用更智能的策略
    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # 方法1：基于市场状态的均值策略（使用前5个特征）
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_weights = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0)  # 只使用前5个特征
            mean_weights = np.clip(mean_weights, 0, None)  # 确保非负
            mean_sum = np.sum(mean_weights)
            mean_weights = mean_weights / mean_sum if mean_sum > 0 else base_weights
        else:
            mean_weights = base_weights
        
        # 方法2：基于波动率的策略
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0)
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / np.sum(inv_vol_weights)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
        
        # 方法3：基于趋势的策略（添加数值稳定性）
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            # 限制趋势值范围，避免指数溢出
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(recent_trend)
            trend_weights = trend_weights / np.sum(trend_weights)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights
        
        # 方法4：动量策略（添加数值稳定性）
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            # 计算最近收益
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            # 限制收益值范围
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            # 减小放大因子，避免指数溢出
            momentum_weights = np.exp(recent_returns * 5)
            momentum_weights = momentum_weights / np.sum(momentum_weights)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # 方法5：反转策略（添加数值稳定性）
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            # 计算最近收益
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            # 限制收益值范围
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            # 减小放大因子，避免指数溢出
            reversal_weights = np.exp(-recent_returns * 5)
            reversal_weights = reversal_weights / np.sum(reversal_weights)
        else:
            reversal_weights = base_weights
        
        # 组合多种策略（随机选择一种以促进多样性）
        strategies = [mean_weights, inv_vol_weights, trend_weights, momentum_weights, reversal_weights, base_weights]
        selected_strategy = np.random.choice(len(strategies))
        
        # 添加随机扰动以促进进化
        noise = np.random.normal(0, 0.05, len(portfolio))
        final_weights = strategies[selected_strategy] + noise
        
        # 确保权重有效
        final_weights = np.clip(final_weights, 0, 1)
        weights_sum = np.sum(final_weights)
        if weights_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = final_weights / weights_sum
        
        return final_weights
    
    # 如果market_state无效，使用等权策略
    return base_weights

"""Enhanced investment strategy with diverse and innovative approaches."""
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        mean_weights = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0)  
        mean_weights = np.clip(mean_weights, 0, None)
        mean_sum = np.sum(mean_weights)
        mean_weights = mean_weights / (mean_sum + 1e-8) if mean_sum > 0 else base_weights

        volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
        inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
        inv_vol_weights /= np.sum(inv_vol_weights)

        recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
        recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
        trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
        recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
        momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        reversal_returns = -recent_returns
        reversal_weights = np.exp(np.clip(reversal_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(reversal_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        strategies = [mean_weights, inv_vol_weights, trend_weights, momentum_weights, reversal_weights]
        selected_strategy = np.random.choice(len(strategies))

        noise = np.random.normal(0, 0.05, len(portfolio))
        final_weights = strategies[selected_strategy] + noise
        final_weights = np.clip(final_weights, 0, 1)
        weights_sum = np.sum(final_weights)
        if weights_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = final_weights / weights_sum

        return final_weights

    return base_weights

            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

            reversal_weights = np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

            strategies = [mean_weights, inv_vol_weights, trend_weights, momentum_weights, reversal_weights, base_weights]
            selected_strategy = np.random.choice(len(strategies))

            final_weights = strategies[selected_strategy]
            noise = np.random.normal(0, 0.05, len(portfolio))
            final_weights += noise
            
            final_weights = np.clip(final_weights, 0, 1)
            weights_sum = np.sum(final_weights)
            final_weights = final_weights / (weights_sum + 1e-8) if weights_sum > 0 else base_weights
            
            return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)
    
    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)
    
    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based weighting
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(trend, -10, 10))
            trend_weights /= np.sum(trend_weights + 1e-8)  # Avoid division by zero
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights
        
        # Volatility adjustment
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights /= np.sum(inv_vol_weights)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
        
        # Mean-reversion with recent price levels
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1)
            mean_reversion_weights /= np.sum(mean_reversion_weights + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights
        
        # Momentum-based weighting
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1) * 5)
            momentum_weights /= np.sum(momentum_weights + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # Combine strategies
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)
        final_weights_sum = np.sum(combined_weights)
        if final_weights_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = combined_weights / final_weights_sum
        
        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

"""Improved version of `investment_strategy_v0` with more diverse strategies."""

    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        
        # Trend-following strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy with risk parity
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights = np.clip(inv_vol_weights / np.sum(inv_vol_weights + 1e-8), 0, 1)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # Combined weights with normalization
        combined_weights = np.mean([trend_weights, inv_vol_weights, mean_reversion_weights, momentum_weights], axis=0)
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)
        
        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

"""Improved version of `investment_strategy_v0` with enhanced diversity and risk control."""

    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # Risk control: normalize weights and ensure validity
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weights_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        if weights_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = combined_weights / weights_sum

        return final_weights

    return base_weights

"""Enhanced version of investment strategy with diverse and innovative approaches."""
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
            
        # Risk-adjusted combination of strategies
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)
        
        # Ensure non-negativity and normalization
        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum

        return final_weights

    return base_weights

"""Improved version of `investment_strategy_v0` with enhanced diversification."""

    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights /= (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights

        # Combine strategies with weights normalization
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        if weight_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

generated_code:
if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights /= np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # Risk control: combine weights using a risk-adjusted metric
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights

    return base_weights

            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

            # Volatility-weighted strategy

            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Mean-reversion strategy
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Momentum strategy
            if len(market_state) > 1:

            # Combine strategies through averaging
            combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4

            weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
            final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

            return final_weights

        inv_vol_weights = np.zeros(5)
        mean_reversion_weights = np.zeros(5)
        momentum_weights = np.zeros(5)

        # Trend-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)

        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        # Combine strategies
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weights_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weights_sum if weights_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights

    return base_weights

        momentum_weights = np.zeros(5)

        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            # Trend-based weights
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))
            trend_weights /= (np.sum(trend_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Volatility-weighted strategy
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights /= (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Mean-reversion strategy
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1)
            mean_reversion_weights /= (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Momentum strategy
            if len(market_state) > 1:
                recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
                recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
                momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))
                momentum_weights /= (np.sum(momentum_weights) + 1e-8)

            # Risk-adjusted combination of strategies
            combined_weights = (
                trend_weights + 
                inv_vol_weights + 
                mean_reversion_weights + 
                momentum_weights
            ) / 4
            combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

            weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
            if weight_sum == 0:
                final_weights = base_weights
            else:
                final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum

            return final_weights
            
    return base_weights

            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        
        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights /= (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        
        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        
        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        
        # Risk control: combine strategies
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

"""Enhanced investment strategy incorporating diverse approaches."""
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)
    
    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based strategy with stability
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy with stability
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy with stability
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 10, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 10, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights

        # Combined weights with diverse allocation
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        if weight_sum == 0:
            final_weights = base_weights
        else:
            final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

"""Enhanced and diversified investment strategy with innovative approaches."""
    
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)
    
    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Initialize weights
        trend_weights = np.zeros(5)
        inv_vol_weights = np.zeros(5)
        mean_reversion_weights = np.zeros(5)
        momentum_weights = np.zeros(5)

        # Trend-based strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        # Volatility-weighted strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)

        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)

        # Combine strategies: average weights
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights) / 4
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        # Normalize weights
        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

generated_code:
"""Enhanced version of investment strategy with diversified approaches."""

    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        trend_weights = np.zeros(5)
        inv_vol_weights = np.zeros(5)
        mean_reversion_weights = np.zeros(5)
        momentum_weights = np.zeros(5)
        reversal_weights = np.zeros(5)

        # Trend-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-weighting strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / (volatility + 1e-8)
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / (np.sum(inv_vol_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights

        # Mean-reversion strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights
        
        # Reversal strategy
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            reversal_weights = np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) + 1e-8))
        
        # Combine strategies
        combined_weights = (
            trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights + reversal_weights
        ) / 5
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weight_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weight_sum if weight_sum > 0 else base_weights

        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights

generated_code:
"""Enhanced investment strategy with multi-faceted approaches."""
    if portfolio is None:
        if market_state is not None and market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            portfolio = market_state[-1, :5] if len(market_state) > 0 else np.ones(5)
        else:
            portfolio = np.ones(5)

    base_weights = np.ones(len(portfolio)) / len(portfolio)

    if market_state is not None and len(market_state) > 0:
        # Trend-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            recent_trend = market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[0, :5]
            recent_trend = np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)
            trend_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_trend, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            trend_weights = base_weights

        # Volatility-based weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            volatility = np.std(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            inv_vol_weights = 1.0 / volatility
            inv_vol_weights = inv_vol_weights / np.sum(inv_vol_weights)
        else:
            inv_vol_weights = base_weights
            
        # Mean-reversion strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5:
            mean_prices = np.mean(market_state[:, :5], axis=0) + 1e-8
            current_prices = market_state[-1, :5] + 1e-8
            mean_reversion_weights = mean_prices / current_prices
            mean_reversion_weights = np.clip(mean_reversion_weights, 0, 1) / (np.sum(mean_reversion_weights) + 1e-8)
        else:
            mean_reversion_weights = base_weights

        # Momentum strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            momentum_weights = np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            momentum_weights = base_weights

        # Reversal strategy weights
        if market_state.shape[1] >= 5 and len(market_state) > 1:
            recent_returns = (market_state[-1, :5] - market_state[-2, :5]) / (market_state[-2, :5] + 1e-8)
            recent_returns = np.clip(recent_returns, -1, 1)
            reversal_weights = np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10)) / (np.sum(np.exp(np.clip(-recent_returns * 5, -10, 10))) + 1e-8)
        else:
            reversal_weights = base_weights

        # Combine weights with risk control and normalization
        combined_weights = (trend_weights + inv_vol_weights + mean_reversion_weights + momentum_weights + reversal_weights) / 5
        combined_weights = np.clip(combined_weights, 0, 1)

        weights_sum = np.sum(combined_weights) + 1e-8
        final_weights = combined_weights / weights_sum
        
        return final_weights
    
    return base_weights
